name: Walnut-Spice Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together butter and sugars.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Sift dry ingredients and stir in alternately with sour milk. Blend in nuts.
4. Spread batter in a greased and floured 13x9x2-inch pan.
5. Top the cake with Bake-On-Meringue (see "Special Cake Toppings") or Lazy Daisy Frosting (see "Special Cake Toppings").
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 35 to 40 minutes, or until cake tests done.
